name: blue-sage/faq-accordion
title: BS — FAQ Accordion
description: Clean, borderless FAQ accordion with animated expand/collapse and full keyboard accessibility.

default.question: How does it work?
default.answer: Getting started is simple. Sign up, connect your tools, and you are live in minutes. Our onboarding guides you through every step.

default.question: Is there a free trial?
default.answer: Yes — every plan includes a 14-day free trial with no credit card required. You get full access to all features from day one.

default.question: Can I change my plan later?
default.answer: Absolutely. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel at any time from your account settings. Changes take effect immediately.

default.question: What does the onboarding look like?
default.answer: After signing up you will be matched with an onboarding specialist who will help you configure your workspace and train your team.

default.question: Do you offer volume discounts?
default.answer: Yes. Teams of 20 or more qualify for custom pricing. Reach out via our contact page and we will build a plan that fits your budget.
